notes: Base — Coinbase's OP Stack rollup on Ethereum. Monorepo holding the components to run Base, primarily Rust. OP Stack derivation/sequencing/node changes and any Base-specific divergence from upstream Optimism are the high-signal areas.

MegaETH's EVM — a Rust encapsulation of revm/op-revm tailored for MegaETH (not a reth/geth fork). Watch interpreter/host/precompile/gas/opcode customizations layered on top of the revm + op-revm stack.

OP Stack monorepo — the canonical upstream for Base and X Layer's Optimism forks. High-signal areas: op-node derivation/sequencer, op-batcher, op-proposer, op-challenger/dispute, op-program/cannon, op-supervisor/interop, and the rust/ workspace (op-reth, kona, op-alloy).

BNB Smart Chain Go execution client — a whole-repo fork of ethereum/go-ethereum with BSC consensus (Parlia) and chain-specific changes. High-signal areas mirror geth: core/, core/vm/, core/types/, consensus/parlia, miner/, eth/, params/ (fork rules).

BSC-compatible Reth client in Rust — described as an extension of paradigmxyz/reth (via the community reth-bsc project) built on reth's NodeBuilder API rather than a hard fork. Watch BSC consensus/EVM/payload wiring and how it tracks upstream reth.

Tempo — a stablecoin-payments blockchain. EVM-compatible execution client built on the Reth SDK (Rust) with Simplex Consensus for fast finality. High-signal areas: reth-SDK node customization, EVM/payload layer, and the consensus integration.

Tempo Zones — software for private blockchains anchored to Tempo with native confidential balances and transactions (Rust + Solidity). Watch the confidential-balance/transaction primitives and the anchoring path back to Tempo.

X Layer's Rust execution client — a customized fork of paradigmxyz/reth optimized for X Layer, an Optimism-based L2. Watch how it tracks upstream reth/op-reth and any X Layer-specific EVM/payload/chainspec divergence.

X Layer's Go execution client — OKX's fork of ethereum-optimism/op-geth (itself a fork of go-ethereum). Upstream OP Stack and geth EL changes (Engine API, deposit-tx, L1 fee, EVM/gas/header/miner/txpool) are what land or need adaptation here.
X Layer's OP Stack monorepo — OKX's fork of ethereum-optimism/optimism. Watch how upstream OP Stack derivation/sequencing/fault-proof/interop changes are merged or diverge for X Layer.
